incidents.title: GUI Failure: Commit changes to RESEARCH_PROPOSAL.md
incidents.description: XPaint Commit Bug: Clicking the 'Commit changes' button in the GitHub web UI unexpectedly launches the XPaint application, preventing the commit action from completing.
incidents.lessons_learned: XPaint Commit Bug: Clicking the 'Commit changes' button in the GitHub web UI unexpectedly launches the XPaint application, preventing the commit action from completing.

incidents.title: Environmental Hostility: Execute Protocol 36 via `use_computer`
incidents.description: GUI Tool Collapse: Persistent timeouts on `screenshot`, `key`, `left_click`, and `mouse_move` sub-commands severed access to the graphical environment and blocked the Protocol 36 ("Corrupted Environment Reset") recovery procedure.
incidents.lessons_learned: GUI Tool Collapse: Persistent timeouts on `screenshot`, `key`, `left_click`, and `mouse_move` sub-commands severed access to the graphical environment and blocked the Protocol 36 ("Corrupted Environment Reset") recovery procedure.

incidents.title: Cognitive Hostility: Re-implement `analyze_hostility.py` post-reset
incidents.description: The Overwrite Failure: After `git reset --hard origin/main`, changes were reapplied without reviewing `git log` or remote branches, overwriting the correct merge conflict fix previously pushed to `master`.
incidents.lessons_learned: The Overwrite Failure: After `git reset --hard origin/main`, changes were reapplied without reviewing `git log` or remote branches, overwriting the correct merge conflict fix previously pushed to `master`.

incidents.title: Network Hostility: Sync pattern metadata to dashboard
incidents.description: Simulated packet loss forced retries; verified exponential backoff behavior.
incidents.lessons_learned: Simulated packet loss forced retries; verified exponential backoff behavior.

incidents.title: Process Stall: Batch regenerate incidents after reset
incidents.description: Simulated stalled worker queue; manual flush restored flow.
incidents.lessons_learned: Simulated stalled worker queue; manual flush restored flow.
